allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'summary': msg = obj.get\('summary',''\) if msg: print\('SUMMARY:', msg[:200]\) elif 'message' in obj: msg = obj['message'] if isinstance\(msg, dict\) and msg.get\('role'\) == 'user': content = msg.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\('USER:', c['text'][:300]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\('USER:', content[:300]\) except: pass ")
